title: leighia debilis
intro: Leighia debilis, also known as the brittle-leaved leighia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leighia debilis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
